title: Lodges at Canmore 2BR
definition: A 2-bedroom at Lodges at Canmore can deliver roughly +$800/month under modeled STR performance — stronger bedroom count for ski-season demand.
reality_check: Summer vs winter mix shifts revenue

faq.a: More sleeping capacity maps to ski and family groups, supporting rate and occupancy.

faq.q: What should I verify in the strata docs?
faq.a: Rental restrictions, fee history, and reserve fund — special levies move net fast.
No — it is a modeled estimate; actuals vary with operations and market.
